resposta:
CharacterStatusWindow < Window
  width: 200
  height: 150
  background-color: #ffffff44
  title: "Status do Personagem"
  @onSetup: |
    self:setPosition(g_ui.screenWidth / 2 - self.width / 2, g_ui.screenHeight / 2 - self.height / 2)

  Label
    id: nameLabel
    anchors.top: parent.top
    anchors.left: parent.left
    padding-left: 10
    padding-top: 10
    text: "Nome do Personagem"

  Label
    id: levelLabel
    anchors.top: nameLabel.bottom
    anchors.left: parent.left
    padding-left: 10
    padding-top: 5
    text: "Nível: 1"

  ProgressBar
    id: healthBar
    anchors.top: levelLabel.bottom
    anchors.left: parent.left
    width: parent.width - 20
    padding-left: 10
    padding-top: 10
    min-value: 0
    max-value: 100
    value: 75

  Label
    id: healthLabel
    anchors.top: healthBar.bottom
    anchors.left: parent.left
    padding-left: 10
    padding-top: 5
    text: "Vida: 75/100"

  ProgressBar
    id: manaBar
    anchors.top: healthLabel.bottom
    anchors.left: parent.left
    width: parent.width - 20
    padding-left: 10
    padding-top: 10
    min-value: 0
    max-value: 100
    value: 50

  Label
    id: manaLabel
    anchors.top: manaBar.bottom
    anchors.left: parent.left
    padding-left: 10
    padding-top: 5
    text: "Mana: 50/100"

```lua
local npc = NPCHandler:new("Vendedor")
function npc:onGreet(player) selfSay("Ola!") end
function npc:onSell(player, item, amount)
    if item:getId() == 268 then -- ID da pocao de vida
        local price = 100 * amount
        player:addMoney(price)
        player:sendTextMessage(MESSAGE_INFO_DESCR, "Voce comprou " .. amount .. " pocoes de vida por " .. price .. " gold.")
        return true
    end
    return false
end
function npc:onBuy(player, item, amount)
    if item:getId() == 2160 then -- ID dos ossos
        local price = 5 * amount
        if player:getMoney() >= price then
            player:addItem(item:getId(), amount)
            player:removeMoney(price)
            player:sendTextMessage(MESSAGE_INFO_DESCR, "Voce vendeu " .. amount .. " ossos por " .. price .. " gold.")
            return true
        else
            player:sendTextMessage(MESSAGE_STATUS_WARNING, "Voce nao tem dinheiro suficiente para comprar isso.")
            return false
        end
    end
    return false
end
npc:register()
```
